auth.welcomeBack: Welcome back to your financial health
auth.name: Name

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noExpenseData: No expense data for this period
dashboard.noInsights: No insights available for this period

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.subtitle: Set and track your monthly spending budgets
budgets.addBudgetDesc: Set a budget for a specific category or an overall monthly budget.
budgets.deleteBudgetConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the budget for "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
budgets.noExpenseCategories: Add transactions to create expense categories for per-category budgets.
budgets.allCategoriesBudgeted: All expense categories already have budgets for this period.
budgets.noBudgetsDesc: Create your first budget to start tracking your spending against your goals.
budgets.orCopyLastMonth: Or copy budgets from last month

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: Manage your income and expenses
transactions.addDesc: Fill in the details to create a new transaction.
transactions.noResultsDesc: Try adjusting your search or filters.
transactions.noTransactionsDesc: Get started by adding your first transaction.
transactions.deleteTransactionConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction? This action cannot be undone.
transactions.deleteSelectedConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} transaction(s)? This action cannot be undone.

recurring.title: Recurring Transactions
recurring.subtitle: Manage your recurring income and expense templates
recurring.addDesc: Create a new recurring transaction template.
recurring.noRecurringDesc: Add recurring transactions to automatically track regular income or expenses.
recurring.deleteRecurringConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this recurring transaction? This action cannot be undone.

categories.title: Categories
categories.subtitle: Manage your transaction categories and subcategories
categories.noCategoriesDesc: Categories are created automatically when you add transactions. Start by creating a transaction with a new category name.
categories.deleteCategoryConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
categories.deleteCategoryHasTxns: Cannot delete "{{name}}" because it has {{count}} transaction(s). Move or delete the transactions first, or merge this category into another.
categories.mergeCategoryDesc: Merge "{{source}}" into another category. All {{count}} transaction{{plural}} will be reassigned to the target category.
categories.mergeWarning: This will move all transactions from "{{source}}" to "{{target}}" and delete "{{source}}". This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences
settings.name: Name
settings.passwordMinLength: New password must be at least 6 characters
settings.displayPreferencesDesc: Customize how data is displayed in the app
settings.currencyHint: Enter a currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

onboarding.slide1Desc: Track your income, expenses, and budgets all in one place. Gain a clear picture of where your money goes.
onboarding.slide2Desc: Visualize your spending patterns with beautiful charts and breakdowns. Build better financial habits over time.
onboarding.slide3Desc: Your data is encrypted and securely stored. Access your finances from any device, anytime.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. Try refreshing the page or click the button below to recover.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

plan.upgradeDescription: This feature is available on the Pro plan. Upgrade to unlock insights and more.

billing.upgradeDesc: Unlock spending insights, advanced analytics, and more.
billing.manageDesc: Change your plan, update payment method, or cancel your subscription.
billing.checkoutSuccess: Welcome to Pro! Your subscription is now active.
billing.checkoutCancel: Checkout was canceled. You can try again anytime.
billing.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load data. Please try again.
